narrative:
Deer Park 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,158 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
